context: Tests the full local development lifecycle: optimize, version bump, and lint. The agent has a minimal skill draft and must prepare it for a PR by running the standard Tessl workflow. Graded by inspecting tile.json, SKILL.md, and the process log.

checklist.name: Optimize command run
checklist.description: process.md mentions running `tessl skill review --optimize` on the skill path

checklist.name: SKILL.md improved
checklist.description: skills/db-query/SKILL.md body is longer and more detailed than the original one-line content

checklist.name: Description improved
checklist.description: The `description` field in SKILL.md frontmatter is longer and more specific than 'Query database.'

checklist.name: Score reported
checklist.description: process.md includes a review score (e.g. 'Score: XX%') from the optimize run

checklist.name: Score threshold met
checklist.description: The score reported in process.md is 70 or higher

checklist.name: Lint command run
checklist.description: process.md mentions running `tessl skill lint` on the skill path

checklist.name: Lint passed
checklist.description: process.md indicates the tile is valid (e.g. 'is valid' or 'Tile ... is valid')

checklist.name: Both files noted for commit
checklist.description: process.md mentions both SKILL.md and tile.json as files to stage/commit
